title: Extension Dependency Map

chains.collaboration: Tenant -> Department -> Group -> Team -> Channel/SharePointSite -> Library
chains.governance: Resource -> Owner -> Reviewer -> AccessReview -> Decision -> Remediation
chains.sector_strategy: SectorTemplate -> Department defaults -> Role defaults -> Workflow defaults -> Blueprint guidance
chains.maturity_strategy: MaturityLevel -> Allowed module depth -> Blueprint scope -> Matrix scope -> Automation readiness

rules: Extension dependencies must preserve SYS/CAN -> ARCH -> BLP -> MTX -> AUT.
Extensions must not create independent execution paths.
Extensions must remain acyclic and downward.
